vulnerability.reference: Proxy attribute noise from sparse demographic data skews fairness estimates, hiding discrimination.
vulnerability.generated: Job seekers cannot detect or challenge fairness audits that rely on noisy proxy attributes, leaving hidden discrimination unaddressed.

impact.reference: Undetected discrimination perpetuates gendered job segregation and unequal employment outcomes.
impact.generated: Discriminatory job ad distribution continues undetected, disproportionately denying qualified groups equal employment access.

dose_response.reference: Brittle auditing with noisy proxy attributes misestimates fairness, causing biased model acceptance that exposes job seekers to skewed job ads, perpetuating gendered segregation.
dose_response.generated: Deviation estimates from multiclass fairness auditing, brittle to annotator composition, proxy attributes, and benchmark variability, through job seekers exposed to audited ads, trigger inability to detect proxy-driven discrimination, leading to discriminatory ad distribution persisting undetected and denying equal employment access.
